SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID
FROM Employees e
JOIN Departments d
    ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID
JOIN Locations l
    ON d.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID
WHERE LENGTH(EMPLOYEE_ID) = 10
  AND l.COUNTRY LIKE '%o%'
  AND l.COUNTRY NOT LIKE '%i%'
ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID DESC

SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID,
       JOB_ID,
       DEPARTMENT_NAME,
       SALARY
FROM Employees e
JOIN Departments d
    ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID
WHERE SALARY < 8000
  AND LAST_NAME LIKE '%e%'
  AND DEPARTMENT_NAME NOT LIKE '%o%'
ORDER BY SALARY ASC

SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID,
       (2026 - BIRTH_DATE) AS AGE
FROM Employees
WHERE CAST((2026 - BIRTH_DATE) AS CHAR) LIKE '%n%'
ORDER BY AGE DESC, HIRE_DATE ASC
